name: RouterView
importStr: import { RouterView } from 'vue-router'; import { QPage } from 'quasar'

width.desc_cn: 编辑模式下的预览宽度

height.desc_cn: 编辑模式下的预览高度

name.desc: When a <router-view> has a name, it will render the component with the corresponding name in the matched route record's components option.
name.desc_cn: 命名视图。当 <router-view> 有 name 时，它将渲染匹配路由记录中 components 选项里对应名称的组件

route.desc: A route location that has all of its components resolved.
route.desc_cn: 已解析所有组件的路由位置对象
